title: Housing Loss Prevention Advice Services 2025
body: "Latest update  18 November 2025 – Publication of an Expression of Interest for the Lancaster HLPAS area  The Legal Aid Agency is inviting Expressions of Interest to deliver HLPAS in the Lancaster HLPAS area. Please see above in ‘Documents’ section for the updated specific information.  The LAA intends to award a contract under this process to commence as soon as possible after the assessment process is complete, as described in the Expression of Interest documentation.  The contract will run until 30 June 2028.  Please contact civil.contracts@justice.gov.uk by 5pm on Tuesday 25 November to express your interest in delivery of the service, following which you will receive details of next steps.  Previous updates  07 November 2025 –  Expression of Interest for the Lancaster HLPAS area – deadline extension  The Legal Aid Agency is inviting Expressions of Interest to deliver HLPAS in the Lancaster HLPAS area. Please see above in ‘Documents’ section for the specific information, updated to include responses to questions raised at the market engagement event.  The LAA intends to award a contract under this process to commence as soon as possible after the assessment process is complete, as described in the Expression of Interest documentation. The contract will run until 30 June 2028.  Please contact civil.contracts@justice.gov.uk by 5pm on Tuesday 18 November 2025 to express your interest in delivery of the service, following which you will receive details of next steps.  30 October 2025 – Publication of an Expression of Interest for the Lancaster HLPAS area  The Legal Aid Agency is inviting Expressions of Interest to deliver HLPAS in the Lancaster HLPAS area. Please see above in ‘Documents’ section for the specific information.  The LAA intends to award a contract under this process to commence as soon as possible after the assessment process is complete, as described in the Expression of Interest documentation.  The contract will run until 30 June 2028.  Please contact civil.contracts@justice.gov.uk by 5pm on Wednesday 5 November 2025 to express your interest in delivery of the service, following which you will receive details of next steps.  8 October 2025 – Publication of an Expression of Interest for the Bury St Edmunds HLPAS area  The Legal Aid Agency is inviting Expressions of Interest to deliver HLPAS in the Bury St Edmunds HLPAS area. Please see above in ‘Documents’ section for the specific information.  The contract will commence on 3 December 2025 and will run until 30 June 2027.  Please contact civil.contracts@justice.gov.uk by 5pm on Wednesday 15 October  2025 to express your interest in delivery of the service, following which you will receive details of next steps.  7 August 2025 – Publication of cancellation of the suspension notice relating to the procurement process for the Housing Loss Prevention Advice Service (“HLPAS”)  Today the LAA has lifted the suspension of the procurement process for the Housing Loss Prevention Advice Service in Slough, Uxbridge and Winchester.  The notice can be found in the ‘documents’ section above.  1 August 2025 – Publication of an Expression of Interest for the Hereford and  Worcester HLPAS...
